title: 40pcs Mason Jar Bottles Bags Reusable Zipper Lock Food Storage Bags 5 Sizes Leakproof Food Saver Sealing Bag Portable Zipper Lock Snack Fresh Bags for Seeds Candy Biscuits Spices
features: 【Airtight Zipper Design】These reusable zip lock bags were made with premium zip, good sealing, not only sort the food, but also keep the food fresh. Convenient to use with sealing strips, helpful to keep water, moisture, dust and odours out, keep things organised and clean

【Reliable and safe】The food storage bags are made of high quality PE material for safe saving, environmentally friendly, odourless and non-toxic and BPA free, helps preserve food longer, reusable, washable and refrigerated

【Mason Jar Bottle Bags】Large opening, mason jar look, these reusable plastic bags are easy to store in the fridge, kitchen and any other place in your home and are a good decoration for your kitchen or freezer. The reusable snack bags are transparent, so you always know what's inside

【Wide Application】Mason jar food bags are suitable for nuts, candy or tea, it is your perfect travelling and camping companion, which is ideal to protect the freshness for a variety of snacks, crackers and sandwich etc. Leak-proof and durable, suitable for travelling and transportation
【Best Choice】You will receive 20 pieces mason jar storage bags in 6 styles, and the size as shown, enough quantity meets your daily life, a wise choice for housewives to organise the kitchen.
description: Package contains: Pack of 40 bags in different sizes with zip closure in mason jar bottle shape. Material: made of high quality PE plastic, safe, reusable and durable. Size: 10 pcs small size: 10.7 x 15 cm. 10 pcs. Medium size: 13.5*19.5cm 10 pieces large size 16.5 x 24.4 cm / 16.5 x 2 10 pieces long size: 9.2 x 31.6 cm. Feature: Mason jar bottle bag: Realistic mason jar look, these reusable storage bags are easy to store in the cupboard, fridge, kitchen and any other place in your home, cute storage bag for your kids, they will be happier when they get biscuits or candy from this bag. Airtight zip closure design: Mason jar bag with double seal, not only sorts food but also keeps food fresh, convenient to use with sealing strips, helpful to keep out water, moisture, dust and odours, save your trouble and keep things organised and clean. WIDE APPLICATION: These mason jar bottle pattern bags are ideal for storing coffee beans, tea, candy, fruit snacks, spices, nuts, biscuits, pretzels, cereal, beef, etc, and can be stored for a long time, portable and durable.
